name: Multi-Embed Aggregator
description: Aggregates video sources from multiple embed services (vidking, 1embed, 2embed, vidlink, vidsrc, embed.su) used by streaming aggregation sites like cineby.at, bcine.ru, flixer.su, flickystream.su, rivestream.app, etc.
author: ARVIO Community
notes: This is a meta-scraper that tries multiple embed backends. It uses TMDB IDs directly, so it works with any site that uses these embed services.
changelog: 1.0.0 - Initial release with support for 7 embed services
